quadrantChart
    title Priorities
    x-axis Effort --> High Effort
    y-axis Low Value --> High Value
    quadrant-1 Do now
    quadrant-2 Plan
    quadrant-3 Drop
    quadrant-4 Delegate
    Task A: [0.2, 0.9]
    Task B: [0.8, 0.8]
    Task C: [0.25, 0.2]
    Task D: [0.7, 0.3]
